commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/manifests/stage1-mpijob-nccl-tests.yaml /tmp/stage1-mpi.yaml && kubectl --context ohio apply -f /tmp/stage1-mpi.yaml'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get mpijobs -n yanxi-validation'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation -o wide'
